name: Airbition Talking Flash Cards for Toddlers 1 2 3 4 Year Olds, Montessori Language Learning Toys with 224 Words, Pocket Speech Therapy Toys, and Speech Development Educational Playthings for Children
bullets: Toddler Montessori Learning Toys: This educational talking flash card features 224 colorful illustrations and sounds. It includes animals, vehicles, food, fruits, and vegetables etc. Kids can expand their vocabulary and enhance cognitive skills while playing
Speech Therapy and Sensory Toys: Talking flashcards are a valuable tool for children. The sound-image combo helps them learn and interact in a Montessori style, making it ideal for speech therapy

Easy to Use: Simply turn on the switch, insert a card into the reader, and hear content in a standard American accent. The reader makes real animal sounds and has a repeat button. Adjust volume with a 5-level control. It’s user-friendly for young children

Rechargeable and Durable: The talking flash cards has a rechargeable battery and USB cable, lasting up to 4 hours on a single charge. It features an auto-off function to save power. Screen-free, it helps reduce screen time and protects toddlers’ eyesight

Good for 1-5 Years: It is an educational device for preschoolers and can also be a travel partner for long drives or road trips. If you are looking for fun and educational device for your kids, this toddler learning flash cards is a good choice

reviews.name: Ashley Weigel
reviews.title: Great gift idea, especially for multiple kids
reviews.body: I bought this talking flash card kit as a Christmas gift, so I didn’t personally use it, but the family I gave it to was really happy with it.They already had one for their daughter in pink, so it was nice to get another one in blue for their son. I really like that there are different color options—it makes it easy for multiple kids to have their own and keep them separate.From what I saw, it…

reviews.name: Chevy Hudspeth
reviews.title: Awsome
reviews.body: Very good learning toy. And very accurate but some words are mispronounced for English language. Well worth the price. Very easy to us and learn. Very durable

reviews.name: Louie Ducci
reviews.title: Great educational tool!
reviews.body: My wife wanted to get this for our son, and I have to admit it turned out to be a great purchase. The bilingual Spanish and English flashcards are a fun way to introduce new words, and having 510 words gives it plenty of variety. So far, my son really likes it and stays engaged while using it. It’s a nice educational toy that makes learning feel fun.

reviews.name: Lisa cain
reviews.title: Great item well worth the money
reviews.body: I love it so does my grandson ;) really helping with his vocabulary!
